name: Caraway Crunches
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter over moderate heat. Add the milk and warm it. Stir in the sugar and salt until dissolved.
2. Mix the melted butter mixture into the starter and combine well.
3. Gradually add flour, 1 cup at a time, stirring until stiff enough to knead by hand.
4. Turn out the dough onto a floured surface and knead the remaining flour into the dough.
5. Divide the dough in half and roll each portion into rectangles measuring approximately 12 by 18 inches.
6. Cut the rectangles in half lengthwise, then cut each half into squares, and finally into triangles.
7. Brush the triangles with beaten egg and sprinkle with caraway seeds.
8. Roll up the triangles from the long side to form a spiral shape.
9. Place the rolled-up dough on a greased cookie sheet.
10. Allow the dough to rise for 30 to 60 minutes, then bake at 375°F for 20 minutes.
